regime_hint.notes: NIFTY daily regime TREND_DOWN (close 24,176.15, -0.62%), ATR 1.41%, vol LOW. India VIX API still down. Crude Brent +3.5% to ~$104.80 on renewed US-Iran rejection (Strait of Hormuz risk). USD/INR 94.5 (rupee firmer vs Fri ~95.16 — IT exporter tailwind muted). Gold +0.63% to $4715 (safe-haven bid). US Fri SPX +0.84%, Nasdaq +1.71% — positive global cue but India-specific drags dominate. FII -Rs 4,110 cr / DII +Rs 6,748 cr on May 8 (DII still absorbing). RBI eased bank capital rules May 8 — structural positive for banks. Scanner top: SBIN, ETERNAL, PNB, BHARTIARTL, BPCL — heavy gap-down across most names (HDFCBANK -1.51%, AXISBANK -0.98%). Major near-term risk: US CPI release Tue May 12 — keep size small.

watchlist.notes: RBI bank-capital easing (May 8) is a structural tailwind. Gap-down -1.51% creates a wide ORB — watch for spread/slippage. No event today. Both bias per #lesson 2026-W19 (long bias blocked 3 SELLs on Fri). 8-share May 7 orphan must reconcile on startup.
Banking, RBI tailwind; gap-down -0.98%, no event. Volume score 5.0 but momentum 0.0 — range-day risk. Allow either direction with 2+ confirmations.
FMCG defensive — preferred in TREND_DOWN regime. Q4 May 21 (outside binary window). Gap-up +0.49% (only one in top scanners). Volume score 5.0. Watch VWAP holds.
Crude +3.5% is mixed (upstream gain vs O2C compression). Gap-down -0.71%. Both bias per #lesson 2026-W19 — 5 SELLs were blocked last Thu by long bias. Strict 2+ confirmations.
Pharma defensive at 52w high. Q4 May 21 (outside). Organon acquisition financing remains a soft headline risk but no scheduled event. Carry from Fri (no entry).
Carry from Fri. Both bias per #lesson 2026-05-06 (13 SELL signals blocked under long bias). Analyst call May 12 — post-earnings, not binary. Gap-down -0.26%.
IT, rupee slightly stronger (94.5) muting tailwind. Gap-down -0.15%. Carry from Fri (no signal). Either direction with strict 2+ confirmations (#lesson 2026-05-07 INFY high-score bypass).
HARD BLOCK — Q4 results Wed May 13 (2 sessions away). Insider trading window closed through May 15. High scanner rank (1.86) but binary risk too close.

rationale: TREND_DOWN regime + crude spike + US CPI tomorrow. 7 tradeable (all 'both' bias) + 1 hard avoid. Risk tightened to max_trades=3 / 1.0% / 2 open after worst-week-to-date (W19, 0 trades Fri, cumulative -Rs 2,108 paper). Banking favored on RBI capital-rules tailwind (HDFCBANK, AXISBANK) but only via 'both' so intraday tape decides. Defensives (ITC, SUNPHARMA) preferred in TREND_DOWN. Lesson-aligned: every name is 'both' except the avoid — directional bias was wrong on 3 of last 4 sessions (TATAPOWER May 6, TCS+HDFCBANK May 8). Explicit exclusions (not on watchlist): TCS (negative reputational news flow per Gemini — sexual-harassment case in headlines), SBIN (residual Q4 volatility + May 16 dividend record), PNB (outside NIFTY 50 + fraud-classification news May 9), DLF (Q4 May 13 + outside universe), BPCL (potential fuel-price-hike binary before May 15), ETERNAL (outside NIFTY 50 universe per #lesson 2026-05-05), ADANIENT (recent SL gap-through + re-entry violations), KOTAKBANK (post-Q4 selling pressure, no fresh catalyst), ICICIBANK (chose AXISBANK as banking diversifier), HINDUNILVR (chose ITC as FMCG diversifier).
lessons_applied: #lesson 2026-W19: default to bias 'both' unless catalyst is robust to intraday price action — all 7 tradeable names are 'both' today
#lesson 2026-W19: high-score bypass loophole — every entry must clear MIN_CONFIRMATIONS=2 regardless of score (applies especially to INFY)
#lesson 2026-W19: banking-cluster Q4 days leak volatility — kept only 2 banks (HDFCBANK, AXISBANK), both 'both' bias
#lesson 2026-W19: partial-qty EOD square-off bug recurred 4x last week — max_open_positions capped at 2 to limit unexited capital
#lesson 2026-05-08: bias invalidation conditions not executed in runtime — avoid directional bias entirely until daily_plan_loader honors invalidation
#lesson 2026-05-05: PNB outside NIFTY 50 universe — excluded; ETERNAL same rule
#lesson 2026-04-30: binary-event days are hard blocks — BHARTIARTL avoid; DLF, BPCL, SBIN excluded outright
#lesson 2026-05-04: STOPPED_SYMBOL_COOLDOWN — HDFCBANK orphan reconciliation required at startup
